input_text:
Setting a minimum code coverage requirement as a CI gate.

After three incidents where untested code paths caused production regressions, the team agreed we need an enforced floor. CI builds will now fail if overall line coverage drops below 80%.

This doesn't mean 80% is the goal — it's the minimum. Critical paths (authentication, payment processing, data mutations) should be close to 100%. The 80% gate exists to prevent coverage from silently eroding over time.

expected.text: Enforce minimum 80% line coverage as a CI gate — builds fail below this threshold. Floor, not target; critical paths should approach 100%

reviewer_notes: Team-agreed CI policy following three regressions caused by untested code.
